title: Abundant Atmosphere
description: A mod that adds new decorative blocks, biomes & plant life!
body:
📻 About : *A small expansion to exploration around the overworld*

Abundant Atmosphere is a bite sized mod that introduces different decorative blocks and small additions that are made to generally expand and somewhat improve the overworld. There are also some changes to existing structures, so far the ancient city, and there will be additional structures being added into the world to overall make exploration more fun and give you different challenges, with unique rewards. Special rewards for exploration so far exist like pots and a special centerpiece statue. There are also new mushroom types to really enhance the feel of most environments.

📃 Features
- New building blocks added for Calcite, Dripstone, Basalt and Deepslate
- New decorative pots to spice up your builds
- All new Poreshroom and Foxfire Mushroom types, with decorative shelf blocks as well- New moss related blocks, like mossy stone and moss clumps
- New ancient city redesign, giving the structure an overall grander and larger feel
